body:
Before I add implicit solvers and radiation, I wanted to clean up a couple of things. Here is a complete list of all the changes in this PR:
- Fix type instabilities
    - Replace all abstract field types with concrete field types; e.g., `Integer` -> `Int`, `AbstractModel` -> `M <: AbstractModel`
    - Make functions specialize on type arguments; e.g., `FT::DataType` -> `::Type{FT}` (not sure if this actually improves performance, but it's done in all our other code)
    - Fix `if`-statement type instability in `initial_conditions/dry_rising_bubble_2d.jl` (not sure if this will still be necessary after Julia 1.7, but might as well)
    - Replace `1.0` with `FT(1)` and `0.0` with `FT(0)` in boundary condtions for `Nonhydrostatic2DModel` and `SingleColumnModel`
- Clean up imports and exports
    - Remove `get_boundary_flux` from the `Models` module while leaving the definition in the `BoundaryConditions` module, which gets rid of a precompilation warning
    - Move `export` statements so that they run before `include` statements, allowing submodules to access exported symbols from parent modules
    - Remove imports of unused symbols
    - Remove unnecessary qualifiers for imported symbols
    - Utilize relative paths for importing from the `ClimaAtmos` module in `/src`
    - Organize imported symbols in a manner that is consistent across files
- Clean up `Domains` module
    - Remove overloaded methods of `ndims`, `length`, and `size` for `AbstractDomain`, since they inconsistently extend the `AbstractArray` interface
    - Remove unnecessary typecasts to `FT`
    - Use consistent interval notation
    - Remove `PeriodicPlane`, which confusingly looks like a separate type from `Plane` and `HybridPlane` (both of which can be periodic)
    - Make `Plane` have a default keyword argument `periodic = (true, true)`
- Clean up `BoundaryConditions` module
    - Remove function stub for `get_boundary_flux`, since the module already provides methods for this function
- Clean up `Models` module
    - Make default methods for `default_initial_conditions` and `make_ode_function` throw errors indicating missing implementations
- Clean up `Callbacks` module
    - Remove default method for `generate_callback`, since the module already provides a method for the only possible input type (`JLD2Output`)
- Clean up `Simulations` module
    - Remove definition of `AbstractSimulation`, as all simulation code is specific to `Simulation`
    - Make `step!` a new function, rather than an overload of `DiffEqBase.step!`
- Clean up `/test`
    - Rewrite `test_domains.jl` so that it is more succinct and so that it tests `make_function_space`
    - Prevent `test_callbacks.jl` from generating an empty folder after it is done running
    - Combine `test_regression.jl` and `test_validation.jl` into `test_simulations.jl`, reducing code duplication and adding missing unit test for Ekman column
    - Ensure that running `runtests.jl` does not print anything (unit tests should be automated, so they should not rely on visual inspection)
    - Remove `Float32` type warnings for simulations, since the type instability fixes allow simulations to run with `Float32`

Note that the use of `FT` in boundary conditions will need to be rethought as I add implicit solvers, since `autodiff` solvers can pass either a `Float64` `FieldVector` or a `Dual` `FieldVector` to the tendency function, depending on the stage of the computation.

There are some other things I'd like to clean up (particularly the unit tests), but I'll leave those for later.

Closes #119
title: Housekeeping 🧹🧹🧹
